part.text: The image kernel lives at the older pre-`image/` path in TensorFlow 2.1.4, so I’m checking that file’s local validation shape before editing.
I found the equivalent code in `tensorflow/core/kernels/draw_bounding_box_op.cc`; the missing guard is directly after the channel-depth validation, matching the newer fix intent.
The hunk applies cleanly against the target base; I’m applying that single source change now.

input.patchText:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: tensorflow/core/kernels/draw_bounding_box_op.cc
@@
     OP_REQUIRES(
         context, depth == 4 || depth == 1 || depth == 3,
         errors::InvalidArgument("Channel depth should be either 1 (GRY), "
                                 "3 (RGB), or 4 (RGBA)"));
 
+    OP_REQUIRES(
+        context, boxes.dim_size(2) == 4,
+        errors::InvalidArgument(
+            "The size of the third dimension of the box must be 4. Received: ",
+            boxes.dim_size(2)));
+
     const int64 batch_size = images.dim_size(0);
     const int64 height = images.dim_size(1);
     const int64 width = images.dim_size(2);
*** End Patch

part.text:
```yaml
backport_result:
  status: success
  patch: |
    diff --git a/tensorflow/core/kernels/draw_bounding_box_op.cc b/tensorflow/core/kernels/draw_bounding_box_op.cc
    index 73db76333f..926ea368a5 100644
    --- a/tensorflow/core/kernels/draw_bounding_box_op.cc
    +++ b/tensorflow/core/kernels/draw_bounding_box_op.cc
    @@ -73,6 +73,12 @@ class DrawBoundingBoxesOp : public OpKernel {
             errors::InvalidArgument("Channel depth should be either 1 (GRY), "
                                     "3 (RGB), or 4 (RGBA)"));
     
    +    OP_REQUIRES(
    +        context, boxes.dim_size(2) == 4,
    +        errors::InvalidArgument(
    +            "The size of the third dimension of the box must be 4. Received: ",
    +            boxes.dim_size(2)));
    +
         const int64 batch_size = images.dim_size(0);
         const int64 height = images.dim_size(1);
         const int64 width = images.dim_size(2);
  notes: >
    Added the missing validation that bounding boxes have a third dimension of size 4 in the TensorFlow 2.1.4 kernel path.
```
